description: Developer workstation readiness policy for macOS/Apple Silicon.

load.description: Load average / CPU core count. Above 1.5 suggests contention.

memory.description: Memory pressure and swap thresholds for agent workloads.

spotlight.description: Directories containing build artifacts that should not be Spotlight-indexed.

container_runtime.description: OrbStack uses native Virtualization.framework with ~50MB idle RAM vs Docker Desktop ~3-4GB.

rust_build.description: Cargo config with sccache wrapper and incremental builds for dev performance.

ui_compositor.description: Reduced compositing work lowers WindowServer CPU on Apple Silicon.

background_processes.description: Known CPU-wasting background processes and launch agents.
